goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'ely'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 14:45'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to ely
The train should depart from cambridge and should arrive by 14:45
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get phone number and postcode
